forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 55. Southwest wind around 9 mph.

forecast.name: Tuesday
forecast.detailedForecast: Sunny. High near 66, with temperatures falling to around 63 in the afternoon. Southwest wind 7 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph.

weather_report:
The air over Downtown San Francisco holds a refreshing clarity, with the overhead sky predominantly clear through the night and into this sunlit Tuesday. A gentle southwest breeze whispers through the streets, creating a mild sensation as the temperature rises, promising to cradle the city in warmth without the harshness of summer's extremes. While the horizon gleams with the subtle shimmer of distant water beneath a delicate cotton-candy sky, hints of marine layer linger just past the Golden Gate, signifying the ever-playful dance between land and ocean.

As the day unfolds, the cold edges of the evening retreat, making way for a lovely afternoon that beckons one outside. Casual layers—perhaps a light sweater over a breathable shirt—will allow for comfort in the coolness of the early hours while remaining adaptable for the warming sun later on. Stroll through the neighborhoods, perhaps savoring a cup of exceptional coffee from a corner café or wandering into the embrace of the latest exhibition at a local gallery. The streets of San Francisco await, inviting both the seasoned explorer and casual wanderer to indulge in the day's gentle resonances.
